creator: ek@purplehat.org
text:
I approve this patch. Thanks again!

On 01/21/2014 08:04 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/maia,
>
> Please note that PR ports/185965 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/185965
>
